name: Extended Formulae
description: Extend formulae for Horadric Cube transmuting.
author: Garrett HE

config.name: Annihilus Enabled
config.description: Enabling this option will cause ordinary monsters to drop Annihilus as well.

config.name: Hellfire Touch Enable
config.description: Enabling this option will cause ordinary monsters to drop Hellfire Torches as well.

config.name: Colossal Jewels Enable
config.description: Enabling this option will cause ordinary monsters to drop Colossal Jewels as well.
